name: firefox-mcp
description: MCP server for Firefox - enables AI assistants to control the browser
author: Hamish Blair

scripts.build:server: cd server && npx esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --outdir=dist --format=cjs --packages=external && npx esbuild index.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/index.js --format=cjs --packages=external
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:extension
